Tennis: Wimbledon Tournament - studio
Tennis: Wimbledon Tournament - 2nd round singles match
programme.desc: Wimbledon traditionally attracts the attention of the tennis world, even though players such as Carlos Alcaraz, Lorenzo Musetti and Holger Rune were absent from the grass courts in London.In turn, Victoria Mboko and Hailey Baptiste do not take part in the women's competition.However, Polish fans have someone to support - they are fighting for the best possible result, among others.defending champion Iga Świątek, as well as Hubert Hurkacz and Kamil Majchrzak.Maja Chwalińska, the French Open finalist, said goodbye to the tournament in the first round.

programme.desc: Wimbledon traditionally attracts the attention of the tennis world, even though players such as Carlos Alcaraz, Lorenzo Musetti and Holger Rune were absent from the grass courts in London.In turn, Victoria Mboko and Hailey Baptiste do not take part in the women's competition.However, Polish fans have someone to support - they are fighting for the best possible result, among others.defending champion Iga Świątek, as well as Hubert Hurkacz and Kamil Majchrzak.Maja Chwalińska, the French Open finalist, said goodbye to the tournament in the first round.

Tennis: Wimbledon Tournament - 2nd round singles match
programme.desc: Wimbledon traditionally attracts the attention of the tennis world, even though players such as Carlos Alcaraz, Lorenzo Musetti and Holger Rune were absent from the grass courts in London.In turn, Victoria Mboko and Hailey Baptiste do not take part in the women's competition.However, Polish fans have someone to support - they are fighting for the best possible result, among others.defending champion Iga Świątek, as well as Hubert Hurkacz and Kamil Majchrzak.Maja Chwalińska, the French Open finalist, said goodbye to the tournament in the first round.
